value_metric: a Board-3 eligibility gate that, before ranking, admits only official primary documents and excludes news noise (0% pollution in the admitted policy view), and extracts the four policy dates 成文/发布/施行/失效 plus status at 100% accuracy -- so the policy board shows authoritative originals with correct effective dates instead of media chatter

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: gate + extractors; not wired into the worker ranker; the 200-sample uses real board3 media items + synthetic official docs with known dates
